ModelInvocationJobInputDataConfig.description: Details about the location of the input to the batch inference job.
ModelInvocationJobInputDataConfig.markdownDescription:
Details about the location of the input to the batch inference job.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

ModelInvocationJobS3InputDataConfig.description: Contains the configuration of the S3 location of the input data.

S3Uri.description: The S3 location of the input data.
S3Uri.markdownDescription:
The S3 location of the input data.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 1024  
Pattern: ^s3://[a-z0-9][-.a-z0-9]{1,61}[a-z0-9](?:/[-!_*'().a-z0-9A-Z]+(?:/[-!_*'().a-z0-9A-Z]+)*)?/?$  
Update requires: No interruption

S3BucketOwner.description: The ID of the AWS account that owns the S3 bucket containing the input data.
S3BucketOwner.markdownDescription:
The ID of the AWS account that owns the S3 bucket containing the input data.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[0-9]{12}$  
Update requires: No interruption

ModelInvocationJobS3InputDataConfig.markdownDescription:
Contains the configuration of the S3 location of the input data.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

ModelInvocationJobOutputDataConfig.markdownDescription:
Details about the location of the output of the batch inference job.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

ModelInvocationJobS3OutputDataConfig.description: Contains the configuration of the S3 location of the output data.

S3Uri.description: The S3 location of the output data.
S3Uri.markdownDescription:
The S3 location of the output data.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 1024  
Pattern: ^s3://[a-z0-9][-.a-z0-9]{1,61}[a-z0-9](?:/[-!_*'().a-z0-9A-Z]+(?:/[-!_*'().a-z0-9A-Z]+)*)?/?$  
Update requires: No interruption

S3EncryptionKeyId.description: The unique identifier of the key that encrypts the S3 location of the output data.
S3EncryptionKeyId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier of the key that encrypts the S3 location of the output data.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: ^(arn:aws(-[^:]+)?:kms:[a-zA-Z0-9-]*:[0-9]{12}:((key/[a-zA-Z0-9-]{36})|(alias/[a-zA-Z0-9-_/]+)))|([a-zA-Z0-9-]{36})|(alias/[a-zA-Z0-9-_/]+)$  
Update requires: No interruption

S3BucketOwner.description: The ID of the AWS account that owns the S3 bucket containing the output data.
S3BucketOwner.markdownDescription:
The ID of the AWS account that owns the S3 bucket containing the output data.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[0-9]{12}$  
Update requires: No interruption

ModelInvocationJobS3OutputDataConfig.markdownDescription:

ModelInvocationJobStatus.description: The status of the batch inference job.
ModelInvocationJobStatus.markdownDescription:
The status of the batch inference job.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: Submitted | InProgress | Completed | Failed | Stopping | Stopped | PartiallyCompleted | Expired | Validating | Scheduled  
Update requires: No interruption

Tag.description: Definition of the key/value pair for a tag.

Key.description: The key name of the tag.
Key.markdownDescription:
The key name of the tag.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9\s._:/=+@-]*$  
Update requires: No interruption

Value.markdownDescription:
The value for the tag.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9\s._:/=+@-]*$  
Update requires: No interruption

Tag.markdownDescription:
Definition of the key/value pair for a tag.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

JobArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the batch inference job.
JobArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the batch inference job.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 1011  
Pattern: ^(arn:aws(-[^:]+)?:bedrock:[a-z0-9-]{1,20}:[0-9]{12}:model-invocation-job/[a-z0-9]{12})$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

JobName.description: A name to give the batch inference job.
JobName.markdownDescription:
A name to give the batch inference job.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 63  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9]{1,63}(-*[a-zA-Z0-9\+\-\.]){0,63}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ModelId.description: The unique identifier of the foundation model to use for the batch inference job.
ModelId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier of the foundation model to use for the batch inference job.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: ^(arn:aws(-[^:]+)?:bedrock:[a-z0-9-]{1,20}:(([0-9]{12}:custom-model/[a-z0-9-]{1,63}[.]{1}[a-z0-9-:]{1,63}/[a-z0-9]{12}$)|(:foundation-model/([a-z0-9-]{1,63}[.]{1}[a-z0-9-]{1,63}([.]?[a-z0-9-]{1,63})([:][a-z0-9-]{1,63}){0,2})|(([0-9a-zA-Z][_-]?)+)$)|([0-9]{12}:(inference-profile|application-inference-profile)/[a-zA-Z0-9-:.]+$)))|([a-z0-9-]{1,63}[.]{1}[a-z0-9-]{1,63}([.]?[a-z0-9-]{1,63})([:][a-z0-9-]{1,63}){0,2})|(([0-9a-zA-Z][_-]?)+)$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

RoleArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service role with permissions to carry out and manage batch inference.

---

Read only property: Yes
